title: The Countdown Begins!
html:
The extraordinary four-year journey for the DeHub team, building a platform to revolutionize and democratize media, is nearly complete. The team believes fixing the monetary system was the first major hurdle which Bitcoin achieved. The next crucial step in this revolution is media. It is a difficult path, with crypto apps historically facing significant app store approval challenges. Stringent cryptocurrency application policies from Apple and Google mean many promising projects never make it past the approval stage. DeHub, however, persisted, refined our approach, and remained committed to delivering something truly exceptional.

The 2023 web app release was not just a soft launch; it was the crucial test phase allowing us to fine-tune features, gather invaluable user feedback, and prove our concept in a real-world environment. Although small in scope, it served its' purpose perfectly, preparing us for the main event. Always vocal about the official app store launch being the biggest catalyst in DeHub's history, that moment is now upon us.

The countdown is now live on dehub.io and set to end on the last day of the app store approval window. If the process goes smoothly as expected, then this countdown remains valid, and we will be live on stores when it hits 0. If edits are required, the countdown will be updated accordingly.

This is not just another milestone; it is THE milestone. After years of development, testing, and refinement, DeHub is about to land in the hands of millions through the world's most trusted app distribution platforms. The countdown on dehub.io represents more than just a time clock; it represents the culmination of countless hours of work, dedication, and unwavering belief in our vision.

The wait is almost over. Visit dehub.io to see the countdown and be part of this historic moment. The future starts now!
